goal: Fix IDOR vulnerabilities in reporting controllers and add date range validation

tasks.name: Create authorization helper for reporting module (B6)
tasks.action: Create helper that resolves memberId from JWT email claim via JDBC and provides assertAccessToMember() method.

tasks.name: Add authorization to DashboardController and ReportController (B6, W15)
tasks.action: Inject ReportingAuthHelper, add Authentication parameter, call assertAccessToMember(). Add fromDate < toDate validation.

tasks.name: Add authorization to ExportController (B6, W15)
tasks.action: Inject ReportingAuthHelper, add Authentication parameter, call assertAccessToMember(). Add date validation to export endpoints.

commitMessage: fix(reporting): add IDOR protection and date validation to reporting endpoints
